revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-1000

A quasi-horizontal layer in the troposphere between the boundaries of which radio energy of a sufficiently high frequency is substantially confined and propagated with abnormally low attenuation.

Reference: C.C.I.R.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Tropospheric radio duct}}
